name: Cappadonna
bio: Cappadonna (Darryl Hill) is an American rapper and official member of the Wu-Tang Clan, known for his energetic delivery, streetwise lyrics, and colorful wardrobe. He debuted on Raekwon's 'Ice Cream' and has contributed to many Wu-Tang and solo projects.
facts: Featured on classic Wu-Tang tracks like 'Winter Warz' and 'Triumph'.
'Cappadonna' is an acronym: 'Consider All Poor People Acceptable Don’t Oppress Nor Neglect Anyone.'
Known for his fashion references and unique slang.
Mentored by U-God before joining Wu-Tang Clan.
Cappadonna was originally set to be a core Wu-Tang member, but went to prison before the group's debut album was recorded, leading to Method Man taking his place.
He made his first major appearance on Raekwon's 'Ice Cream' and Ghostface Killah's 'Ironman' before officially joining the Clan.
Cappadonna is known for recording some verses in a single take, including his legendary 'Winter Warz' verse.
He has a reputation for referencing high-end fashion brands and has called himself 'Poppy Wardrobe' in his lyrics.
Cappadonna once drove a taxi in Baltimore between album releases.
He is a member of Theodore Unit, a group founded by Ghostface Killah.

songs.title: Winter Warz
songs.lyrics:
Yo, I got a crazy, fresh flow, Cappadonna's the name
Known for my style and my rugged street game...

songs.title: Triumph
songs.lyrics:
As the world turns, I spread like germs
Bless the globe with the pestilence
The hard-headed never learn
It's my testament to those burned
Play my position in the game of life, standin' firm
On foreign land, jump the gun out the fryin' pan
Into the fire, transform into the Ghost Rider
A six-pack and a streetcar named Desire
Who got my back in the line of fire holdin' back?
What? My peoples, if you with me, where the fuck you at?
Niggas is strapped and they tryna twist my beer cap
It's Court adjourned for the bad seed from bad sperm
Herb got my wig fried like a bad perm
What the blood clot? We smoke pot and blow spots
You wanna think twice? I think not.
The iron lung ain't got to tell you where it's comin' from
Guns of Navarone, tearin' up your battle zone
Rip through your slums.

songs.title: Slang Editorial
songs.lyrics:
Yo, the saga begins, begin war
I draw first blood, be the first to set it off...

songs.title: Run
songs.lyrics:
Run, run, run, Cappadonna's on the track
I keep it real, never front, always got your back...

songs.title: Super Model
songs.lyrics:
Super model, walk that walk, show that style
Cappadonna in the place, make the crowd go wild...

songs.title: Dart Throwing
songs.lyrics:
Dart throwing, sharp like a sword
Cappadonna on the mic, always praised by the Lord...

songs.title: Milk the Cow
songs.lyrics:
Milk the cow, I got the skills to wow
Cappadonna in the building, let me show you how...

songs.title: 97 Mentality
songs.lyrics:
97 mentality, reality, fatality
Cappadonna's strategy, always bringin' the heat...

songs.title: Heaterz
songs.lyrics:
Heaterz, bring the fire, Cappadonna never tire
Wu-Tang Clan forever, always aiming higher...
